inline_comments.message: Do we need this? Why not just use call_api directly in the scripts that create the resources. IMHO, it makes it easier to read those scripts.

Hi Kiran,
I've created this function because it serves as universal way to test if deleting resource works (first delete resource, then you shouldn't be able to "GET" it) in order to reduce duplicating code. Using it would also make testcases more consistent by reusing common "delete" scenario.
This Change is already merged, but if you have any further doubts or advices, please notify me in https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/multicloud/k8s/+/91540/, where I've continued aligning differences between plugin*.sh tests
